description: word 'service' appears only in a comment describing an external service — not a Service class
input:
class PaymentsController < ApplicationController
  before_action :authenticate_user!

  # Handles callbacks from the Stripe payment service
  def create
    @payment = Payment.new(payment_params)
    if @payment.save
      redirect_to @payment, notice: 'Payment recorded.'
    else
      render :new, status: :unprocessable_entity
    end
  end

  private
    def payment_params
      params.expect(payment: [ :amount_cents, :stripe_charge_id ])
    end
end
